creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for updating the Makefile, now build completes here successfully, too.
But please check your dependencies. RUN_DEPENDS on a static lib?
Also you are expecting the build process to use the static libs you have defined in BUILD_DEPENDS, but the build scripts select shared libs:

	libwwwapp.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libwwwapp.so.1 (0x802545000)

Please ensure that {BUILD,LIB,RUN}_DEPENDS are accurate, then we can commit this. Thanks in advance!
